title: PurchaseOrderLineItem
description: A line item within a purchase order representing a specific good or service being procured

numberOnPO.description: Line item number within the purchase order. Unique within the order.

description.description: Description of the item or service being purchased

itemCategory.description: Item category code distinguishing material, service, or other item types

accountCategory.description: Account assignment category for the line item expenditure

needByDate.description: Requested delivery date for the line item (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD)

accountings.description: Split accounting assignments for distributing costs across multiple cost objects

receivingType.description: Receiving type value indicating how receipts should be processed for this line item

taxCode.description: Tax code per evaluated receipt settlement agreements

itemOnRequisition.description: Line number of the corresponding item in the originating requisition

serviceStartDate.description: Service period start date (for service line items)

serviceEndDate.description: Service period end date (for service line items)

comments.description: Additional comments or notes on the line item
